script:
#!/bin/bash
set -uo pipefail

echo '=== VPS SYSTEM AUDIT ==='
echo "Date: $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC')"
echo "Hostname: $(hostname)"
echo ""

# 1. System
echo '=== 1. SYSTEM ==='
uname -a
uptime
free -m
df -h /
echo ""

# 2. SSH Security
echo '=== 2. SSH ==='
grep -E '^(PermitRootLogin|PasswordAuthentication|Port )' /etc/ssh/sshd_config 2>/dev/null || echo 'sshd_config not readable'
echo ""

# 3. Firewall
echo '=== 3. FIREWALL ==='
ufw status 2>/dev/null || iptables -L -n 2>/dev/null | head -30 || echo 'no firewall tools'
echo ""

# 4. Open ports
echo '=== 4. PORTS ==='
ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN || netstat -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN || echo 'no port info'
echo ""

# 5. Services
echo '=== 5. SERVICES ==='
for svc in n8n nginx docker claude-code control-bridge github-webhook; do
  status=$(systemctl is-active $svc 2>/dev/null || echo 'not found')
  echo "  $svc: $status"
done
echo ""

# Docker containers
echo '=== 5b. DOCKER ==='
docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}' 2>/dev/null || echo 'no docker'
echo ""

# 6. SSL
echo '=== 6. SSL ==='
if [ -d /etc/letsencrypt/live ]; then
  for d in /etc/letsencrypt/live/*/; do
    domain=$(basename "$d")
    [ "$domain" = 'README' ] && continue
    expiry=$(openssl x509 -enddate -noout -in "${d}fullchain.pem" 2>/dev/null | cut -d= -f2)
    echo "  $domain: expires $expiry"
  done
else
  echo 'No Let\'s Encrypt certs'
fi
echo ""

# 7. Security updates
echo '=== 7. UPDATES ==='
apt list --upgradable 2>/dev/null | grep -i security | wc -l | xargs -I{} echo '{} security updates pending'
echo ""

# 8. Fail2ban
echo '=== 8. FAIL2BAN ==='
fail2ban-client status sshd 2>/dev/null || echo 'fail2ban not active'
echo ""

# 9. Cron
echo '=== 9. CRON ==='
crontab -l 2>/dev/null || echo 'no cron'
echo ""

# 10. Git repos
echo '=== 10. GIT REPOS ==='
find /root /home /opt -maxdepth 4 -name '.git' -type d 2>/dev/null | while read g; do
  dir=$(dirname "$g")
  branch=$(cd "$dir" && git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)
  echo "  $dir [$branch]"
done
echo ""

# 11. Env files
echo '=== 11. ENV FILES (paths only) ==='
find /root /home /opt -maxdepth 4 -name '.env' -type f 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo ""

echo '=== AUDIT COMPLETE ==='
intent: Full VPS system audit v5 — with contents:write permission
